_note: One main quest per chapter. Each step completes when its flag lands; flags are set by dialog nodes (set_flag), room entry (on_enter_flag), item grants/pickups (granted_/took_), and cracked databases (cracked_<id>).

q01_the_job.name: The Job
q01_the_job.desc: Say goodbye to the beach. Hear Conroy out. Take the Mitchell contract — or admit you have nothing else.

steps.text: Walk the beach with Allison one more time.
Learn what Allison isn't telling you.
Meet Conroy at the cantina.
Review the Mitchell dossier.
Accept the extraction contract.

q02_first_run.name: First Run
q02_first_run.desc: Run the target Two-a-Day sold you. Survive what's waiting in the ice. Get out of Barrytown alive.

steps.text: Pick up the icebreaker slab's run codes from Leon's.
Jack in from your mother's condo and run the target.
Come to on the floor — and understand what saved you.
Get out before the condo goes up.
Reach Big Playground and lie low.

q03_the_commission.name: The Commission
q03_the_commission.desc: The richest man alive wants to hire the most disgraced gallerist in Paris. Hear the offer. See the box. Decide.

steps.text: Survive the interview at Galerie Duperey.
Walk in Virek's garden — the Güell Park construct.
Study the Cornell box he keeps in the dark.
Accept the commission.
Set up operations at Andrea's flat in Paris.

q04_the_extraction.name: The Extraction
q04_the_extraction.desc: Mitchell comes over the wire at dawn. Have the site, the surgeons, and the exit ready when he does.

steps.text: Inspect the perimeter with Sutcliffe.
Check the medical pod and its surgical team.
Take Webber's read on the crew — and on Conroy.
Man the bunker for the dawn signal.
Get to the crash site.
Get the girl to the jet before the sky falls.

q05_the_loa.name: The Loa
q05_the_loa.desc: The men who saved you deal with things that live in the matrix. Find out what touched you in the ice — and what it wants.

steps.text: Hear Beauvoir's explanation of the loa.
Learn who really owns the icebreaker you ran.
Ask Jackie about the girl in the ice — Vyèj Mirak.
Get your deck back from Two-a-Day.
Agree to go into the Sprawl with Lucas.

q06_the_trail.name: Names of the Dead
q06_the_trail.desc: Alain has a lead on the boxes and a price. Pay it. Then deal with what paying it uncovers.

steps.text: Meet Alain at the brasserie.
Raise his price from Virek's chip.
Confide in Andrea — someone has to know.
Return to Alain's flat for the coordinates.
Take the coordinates from his coat.
Board the JAL shuttle at Orly.

q07_rudys_place.name: The Squirrel Wood
q07_rudys_place.desc: Rudy can scan what Mitchell grew in his daughter's head. Stay long enough to learn it. Leave before it kills your brother.

steps.text: Talk your way past Rudy's dogs and Rudy.
Let Sally settle Angie in.
Help Rudy run the scan.
Hear what the biosoft really is.
Check the treeline — count the drones.
Leave for the Sprawl before dawn.

q08_jammers.name: Count Binary Interrupt
q08_jammers.desc: The club is a box with you inside it. Break the siege the only way a cowboy can — from the inside of the matrix.

steps.text: Take stock of the siege with Jammer.
Hear Beauvoir's read on who's paying the street.
Jack in from Jammer's deck with Jackie.
Survive the hired ice.
Reach Jaylene Slide and give her Conroy's name.
Watch the siege break.

q09_wrack_and_whirl.name: Wrack and Whirl
q09_wrack_and_whirl.desc: Dock at the dead cores. Find the hands that make the boxes. Be standing somewhere survivable when Virek reaches for them.

steps.text: Dock the Sweet Jane at the cores.
Follow Jones through the dark to the Wig.
Reach the boxmaker's dome.
Witness a box being born.
Face Virek when he comes through.
Leave with the one box that's yours.
